EVENTS & BRANDING

MORE THAN 20 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE ALLOWS US TO OFFER ONLY THE FINEST SOLUTIONS TO OUR MEMBERS such as tailor made events, branding, marketing, social and digital

SHARED VALUES
THAT MATTER

THE PROJECT IS SUPPORTED BY H.E PRESIDENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF CYPRUS, THE FIRST LADY AS WELL AS THE CYPRUS CHAMBER OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY

The Red Diamond International Business Women Awards, founded in 2020, honor women whose leadership, vision, and integrity create real impact.

More than an awards platform,
Red Diamond is a purpose-driven ecosystem,
now extended through the International
Business Club, connecting, empowering,
and supporting women who lead with
conscience and purpose.

Appreciation From
Distinguished International Guests

One of the most distinguished and memorable events

MARIANNA HADJIANTONIOU General Secretary of Cyprus Paralympic Committee, Executive Committee Member of CIBA, Committee Member for Technology & Innovation at Limassol Chamber of Commerce and Industry

Truly one of the finest events we have had the privilege to attend

H.E PRESIDENT & FIRST LADY OF THE REPUBLIC OF CYPRUS
(2013-2023)

A first-class experience that reflected extraordinary vision

H.R.H. Princess Kholoud Bint Khaled Bin Nasser Bin Abdulaziz
Al Saud of Saudi Arabia.

Art with soul.
Purpose with power.
A vision for women.
ELIZABETH FRIEDRICH FOUNDER

Through bold creative expression, international projects, and purpose-driven initiatives, she amplifies women’s voices and transforms creativity into meaningful impact.

Founder of the powerful talk show platform Crossroads by Elizabeth Friedrich, and born in Armenia, a true resident of the world, her work blends elegance, depth, and social responsibility, shaping a new narrative where art inspires change.

Driven by a belief that creativity carries responsibility, Elizabeth builds platforms that connect women, ideas, and cultures.

From art and fashion to media and social initiatives, her work reflects a commitment to authenticity, leadership, and lasting influence. She continues to redefine modern creative leadership by placing purpose, women’s empowerment, and human connection at its core.
